source.multipart_basis: Decomposition inferred from the original prompt; no rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt:
Design a potted threaded insert installation in an aluminum-honeycomb sandwich panel, delivered as a multi-part assembly because the 'insert' as a pass/fail entity includes the insert body, the surrounding potting compound, and the local sandwich panel that together form the load path: (A) the threaded insert body, (B) the potting compound annulus, (C) the local sandwich panel region (face sheets + honeycomb core). The installation carries a 150 N tensile pull-out plus 80 N transverse shear service load at limit, governed by ECSS-E-HB-32-22A (20 March 2011) closed-form pull-out, shear-out, and combined-load allowables.

Geometry. Sandwich panel local region 300 mm x 300 mm, total thickness 25.4 mm, face-sheet AA 2024-T3 thickness 0.4 mm per face, Al 5056 honeycomb core 3/16-5056-.0007 24.6 mm thick. The insert is a fully potted KSN16 (KN-1016-4) class with nominal body diameter D_i = 16 mm, potting compound outer diameter D_p = 20 mm, insert height h = 12 mm (partial depth - NOT through the full core; this is a blind insert), internal M5 thread. Potting compound is 3M Scotch-Weld EC-2216 or equivalent, assumed shear strength tau_pot = 17 MPa, tensile 20 MPa.

Loads. LC1 (pull-out): axial tensile force F_T = 150 N at limit on the insert thread axis, with ECSS metallic ultimate SF of 1.25. LC2 (shear): transverse force F_S = 80 N at limit. LC3 (combined): simultaneous 150 N pull-out + 80 N shear, evaluated against the ECSS quadratic interaction equation (F_T/F_T_allow)^2 + (F_S/F_S_allow)^2 <= 1.

Allowables per ECSS-E-HB-32-22A closed-form equations. (a) Pull-out face-sheet punch-through: P_face = 2 * pi * D_p * t_face * tau_face. (b) Pull-out core shear tear-out: P_core = pi * D_p * h * tau_core_W = 882 N (limiting). (c) Shear: S_core = D_p * h * sigma_core_crush = 612 N. (d) Combined quadratic interaction.

Pass/fail criteria reproduce ECSS-E-HB-32-22A verbatim. (R1) At limit x 1.25 ultimate SF, pull-out demand <= P_core = 882 N. (R2) Shear demand <= 612 N. (R3) Combined interaction <= 1.0. (R4) M5 thread strip margin. (R5) Panel local face-sheet under LC3 combined <= Fty_face / 1.25 = 232 MPa. (R6) Potting compound volume <= 12 cm^3 per insert.

Assembly policy. The pull-out allowable P_core references the potting outer diameter D_p and the core thickness h together; the face-sheet punch-through allowable P_face references both face-sheet thickness and potting diameter. The failure modes are therefore intrinsically assembly-level and cannot be evaluated on insert-alone, potting-alone, or panel-alone geometry.

Solver and analysis expectations. Primary verification is ECSS-E-HB-32-22A closed-form hand-calculation of R1-R4 on the assembled insert-in-panel geometry. A supporting 3D FEM with solid potting, solid insert body, and shell face-sheets is recommended for R5 but not mandatory. Buckling, modal, thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are NOT required.

Deliverables. STEP AP242 of the assembled insert + potting + local panel region, insert mass in grams, margins for R1-R6, and if FEM is run, the peak face-sheet stress at LC3.
short_prompt:
Design a potted threaded insert installation in an aluminum-honeycomb sandwich panel, delivered as a multi-part assembly: the insert body, the potting compound annulus, and the local sandwich panel (face sheets + honeycomb core). Governing reference ECSS-E-HB-32-22A (20 March 2011) with ECSS metallic ultimate SF 1.25.

Envelope. Local panel 300 x 300 mm, total thickness 25.4 mm; face sheets AA 2024-T3 0.4 mm per face; Al 5056 honeycomb 3/16-5056-.0007 core 24.6 mm; fully potted KSN16 (KN-1016-4) insert body D_i = 16 mm, potting outer D_p = 20 mm, insert height h = 12 mm (blind, partial depth), internal M5 thread. Potting compound 3M Scotch-Weld EC-2216 (assumed shear 17 MPa, tensile 20 MPa).

Load cases.
- LC1 pull-out: F_T = 150 N axial at limit.
- LC2 shear: F_S = 80 N transverse at limit.
- LC3 combined: 150 N + 80 N, quadratic interaction (F_T/F_T_allow)^2 + (F_S/F_S_allow)^2 <= 1.

ECSS-E-HB-32-22A closed-form allowables: core shear tear-out P_core = pi * D_p * h * tau_core_W = 882 N (limiting); shear crush S_core = D_p * h * sigma_core_crush = 612 N. Face-sheet under LC3 combined <= Fty_face / 1.25 = 232 MPa. Potting compound volume <= 12 cm^3 per insert.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: ECSS-E-HB-32-22A is a closed-form handbook; FEM is optional supporting.

prompt.title: Potted sandwich insert assembly sized by ECSS-E-HB-32-22A allowables
prompt.brief: KSN16 potted insert in 25.4 mm Al-honeycomb sandwich carrying 150 N pull-out + 80 N shear; pull-out / shear-out / combined closed-form pass on integrated insert+potting+panel.

parts.name: threaded_insert_body
parts.role: metallic threaded insert providing the M5 internal thread

parts.name: potting_compound
parts.role: adhesive annulus around the insert body that transfers load to the panel core + face sheets

parts.name: local_sandwich_panel_region
parts.role: 300 mm x 300 mm patch of panel (2024-T3 face sheets + 5056 honeycomb core) receiving the insert

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: P_core = pi * D_p * h * tau_core_W; SF 1.25
A286 M5 min strip ~9 kN vs 187.5 N ultimate demand
Generated coverage gate: ensures prompt-level envelope, body-count, report-field, and part geometry constraints are represented by an explicit geometry audit experiment.

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: solid potting + solid insert + shell face + core-equivalent solid on integrated geometry

interfaces.load_path: shear of pull-out / shear from insert OD into potting

interfaces.mediated_by: bond to core cells + face-sheet inner surface
interfaces.load_path: tear-out into core at tau_core_W; punch-through at face-sheet at tau_face

fem_check_policy.rationale: P_core, S_core, and the quadratic interaction all reference the potting-to-core interface and face-sheet-to-potting interface; pass/fail has no meaning on the insert body, potting, or panel evaluated in isolation.

notes.why_multi_part_is_inherent: The part_class is 'sandwich_insert_assembly' and the ECSS-E-HB-32-22A failure modes explicitly couple insert, potting, and panel. The checklist is not the insert standalone.

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Random-vib amplification rolled into quasi-static limit loads.

eval_coverage: three ECSS-E-HB-32-22A closed-form equations on integrated assembly
margins-of-safety against all four failure modes

generated_eval_coverage.purpose: Add runnable CCX coverage kit for JSON-only multipart prompt.
generated_eval_coverage.note: Generated checks assert solver coverage for every FEA-grade requirement, every declared load case, and prompt-level geometry constraints; they are not a domain-specific certification model.
